scenarios.name: predictions stay sealed from other members until the event is revealed

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_prediction_league__events (id, title, type, status, created_by, created_by_name, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'number', 'open', ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO app_prediction_league__predictions (id, event_id, member_id, member_name, value, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO app_prediction_league__predictions (id, event_id, member_id, member_name, value, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE app_prediction_league__events SET status = 'revealed', correct_answer = ? WHERE id = ?

scenarios.name: a member can only submit one prediction per event

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_prediction_league__events (id, title, type, status, created_by, created_by_name, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'choice', 'open', ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO app_prediction_league__predictions (id, event_id, member_id, member_name, value, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO app_prediction_league__predictions (id, event_id, member_id, member_name, value, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

scenarios.name: predictions freeze once the event is locked

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_prediction_league__events (id, title, type, status, created_by, created_by_name, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'text', 'open', ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO app_prediction_league__predictions (id, event_id, member_id, member_name, value, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
UPDATE app_prediction_league__events SET status = 'locked' WHERE id = ?
UPDATE app_prediction_league__predictions SET value = ? WHERE id = ?

scenarios.name: only adults create and manage events; children may still predict

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_prediction_league__events (id, title, type, status, created_by, created_by_name, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'choice', 'open', ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO app_prediction_league__events (id, title, type, status, created_by, created_by_name, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, 'choice', 'open', ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO app_prediction_league__predictions (id, event_id, member_id, member_name, value, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
